name: News Aggregator Search Skill
description: Performs web search via free RSS news feeds (Cointelegraph, CoinDesk, etc.) to extract real-time news, narrative trend signals, and sentiment for active prediction events. No API key required.

tools.name: search_news_feeds
tools.description: Queries RSS news aggregator for live articles, news reports, and events relevant to prediction markets.

query.description: The search query string, e.g. 'Solana ETF approval chances 2026'.

count.description: Maximum number of search results to return.
